caption: A woman with short black hair and glasses is speaking against a solid black background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved tunic featuring a decorative floral embroidered collar and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the lower-left corner of each scene, a small circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman's facial expressions change slightly as she speaks, with her mouth opening and closing and her eyes shifting. Her head remains centered in the frame, and the lighting remains constant, casting a soft glow on her face and clothing. The composition remains a medium close-up throughout the clip, focusing on her upper body.
